ai-inference-lab.ecosystemRole: Model operations and AI serving foundation
ai-inference-lab.problemShort: AI models are easy to demo but hard to operate, measure, and scale reliably.

infraforge.ecosystemRole: Core platform operating model and GitOps foundation
infraforge.problemShort: Small teams need production discipline across K8s delivery, secrets, and recovery.

sentinel-copilot.ecosystemRole: Operational intelligence and cluster guardian layer
sentinel-copilot.problemShort: Infrastructure teams are overwhelmed by scattered alerts, metrics, and incidents.

project-iris.ecosystemRole: Governed personal AI assistant for everyday work
project-iris.problemShort: People lose time context-switching between email, calendar, research, and decisions.

jerry.ecosystemRole: Mobile operator interface for the InfraForge ecosystem
jerry.problemShort: Useful AI assistance stays locked in desktop workflows when mobile access is needed.

ai-builders-academy.ecosystemRole: AI education platform for builders aged 6-16
ai-builders-academy.problemShort: Young learners lack structured, project-based AI and coding education.

young-coders.problemShort: Coding education lacks a practical, product-building curriculum for learners.

vault-ops.ecosystemRole: Secrets operations toolkit for Kubernetes platform teams
vault-ops.problemShort: Platform teams need repeatable, safe secret operations without fragile manual steps.

openleaf.ecosystemRole: Reference SaaS architecture and cloud-native case study
openleaf.problemShort: Digital product teams need a reference architecture showing the full SaaS operating model.
